message:
feat(vc_tui): add RunOptions, run_with_options entry point, and remap screen shortcuts

- RunOptions struct with inline_mode, inline_height, mouse_support fields
- screen_mode() resolver mapping RunOptions -> ftui::ScreenMode (AltScreen vs Inline)
- run_with_options() public entry point that wires RunOptions into ftui backend
- Screen::shortcut() remapped from letter mnemonics to number keys (1-0)
  with legacy letter aliases preserved via Screen::from_binding()
- Screen::from_binding() resolves both numbered (1-0) and legacy (o/m/r/a/etc.) shortcuts
- Re-export SettingsData and render_settings from public API
- Doc comment lint fixes (backtick-wrapping of FrankenTUI, Model)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
